title: koeleria cristata
intro: Koeleria cristata, also known as June grass or hair grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting digestion. Koeleria cristata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or inflorescence to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
